## [00:00 - 00:58]

Hey guys, my name is Mike Place and I'm a speaker trainer and breakthrough specialist here at Mastermind.com and I am so honored to be on this journey with you all. For me and my life, I didn't have it all figured out at the beginning and I made a lot of mistakes and it took me a long time to overcome the self-limiting beliefs, the doubt, the fear, the I'm not good enough. I'm not worthy and it took me forever to break through, to overcome, to step in and to become the person that I knew I was capable of becoming and I am so honored to come alongside of you, to serve you and assist you in breaking through those limitations, in overcoming anything that might be holding you back right now and most importantly to serve you in getting the results and making the impact that only you can make.
